channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wien Süßenbrunn ↔ Wien Stadlau
item.description: Due to a rescue operation, between Wien Süßenbrunn Bahnhst and Wien Leopoldau Bahnhst (U) and Wien Süßenbrunn Bahnhst and Wien Stadlau Bahnhst (U), currently no … [Since 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to a rescue operation, between Wien Süßenbrunn Bahnhst and Wien Leopoldau Bahnhst (U) and Wien Süßenbrunn Bahnhst and Wien Stadlau Bahnhst (U), currently no …
[Since 17.07.2026]

item.title: U6: Corrupted overhead line
item.description: The line U6 currently runs only between Siebenhirten and Tscherttegasse and between Floridsdorf and Längenfeldgasse. [On 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The line U6 currently runs only between Siebenhirten and Tscherttegasse and between Floridsdorf and Längenfeldgasse.
[On 17.07.2026]

item.title: 11A: weather
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: weather. [On 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: weather.
[On 17.07.2026]

item.title: 37: fire-brigade operation
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 17.07.2026]

item.title: 40A: fire-brigade operation
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 17.07.2026]

[On 17.07.2026]

item.title: 13A: Buses stop at Gumpendorfer Straße to Kopernikusgasse

item.title: Wien Hütteldorf ↔ St. Pölten Hauptbahnhof
item.description: Due to construction works trains between St.Pölten Hbf and Wien Hütteldorf train station (U) at 25.07.2026 are diverted from the trains 1943 and 1945 and from the 26.07.2026 … [Since 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works trains between St.Pölten Hbf and Wien Hütteldorf train station (U) at 25.07.2026 are diverted from the trains 1943 and 1945 and from the 26.07.2026 …
[Since 17.07.2026]
